about_meta_title: About Me | Lucía Giulietti – Technical-Scientific and NAATI Translator
about_meta_description: Meet Lucía Giulietti, technical-scientific and NAATI certified translator English ↔ Spanish. Training, international experience, and professional commitment.
about_og_title: Lucía Giulietti – Technical-Scientific and NAATI Translator

about_twitter_description: Technical-scientific and NAATI translator English ↔ Spanish. Learn about my background and experience.
about_lead: I am Lucía Giulietti, a technical-scientific English translator graduated in Buenos Aires, Argentina, and a NAATI certified translator and interpreter in Australia.
about_p1: Since 2021, I have been helping clients worldwide achieve their goals: publishing scientific papers, translating health courses, expanding into foreign markets, and promoting climate action, among others. I have worked with global organizations and as part of the International Federation of Translators' team, ensuring I meet the highest industry standards.
about_p2: In 2023, I moved to Australia, where I traveled and immersed myself in the local culture. Driven by a desire to help the Spanish-speaking community here, I obtained NAATI certification in English <> Spanish for both translation and interpreting, becoming a trusted partner for my clients. I strictly adhere to the NAATI and AUSIT codes of ethics to guarantee the highest standards of quality, confidentiality, and professionalism in every project.
about_highlight_title: What I enjoy most about translation
about_highlight_text: Creating a positive impact. I believe that behind every translation, there is a person with a goal: accessing health or public services, migrating to another country, expanding a business internationally, or publishing a new scientific discovery. I work with passion, commitment, and professionalism on every project.
about_contact_text: If you would like to tell me about your project or have a question, please write to me via:
about_photo_caption:
Lucía Giulietti

feat1_p: You’ll speak with a professional who adapts to your needs, answers your questions and helps you reach your goals because we understand that, behind every translation, there’s a person working towards a migration, career or educational dream.
feat2_p: When we work with important documents, accuracy is essential. That’s why our translations are handled by specialised professionals who use the right terminology and follow each industry’s standards for documents to be accepted by the relevant authorities.
feat3_p: We know your time is valuable. That’s why we provide clear, convenient turnaround times so you can plan without delays. We guarantee confidentiality and adhere to the NAATI and AUSIT codes of ethics.
value_title: A Translation Opens the Doors to the World

faq1_q: How much does a NAATI translation cost? What is the turnaround time?
faq1_p1: The quote and delivery time will depend on the number of pages, the document format, and the complexity of the content.
faq2_p1: Orders are confirmed upon 100% payment. We will share bank details or alternatives if you do not have an Australian bank account.
faq3_p1: The translation is delivered via email with a digital stamp, unless a hard copy is requested. It is important to note that NAATI digital translations are as valid as those with a physical ink stamp. Translations do not have an expiration date.
faq4_p1: NAATI is the national authority in Australia that sets standards, assesses competencies, and certifies translators and interpreters.
faq5_p1: AUSIT is the Australian Institute of Interpreters and Translators. It represents language professionals nationwide to ensure quality standards in the industry. Members undergo continuous professional development and adhere to a code of ethics.

srv4_subtitle: In which settings do we work?
srv1_p: We work with a range of industries and help businesses expand, attract more clients, and meet each country’s quality standards and cultural expectations. We build translation memories to maintain consistency and terminology databases to ensure accuracy for every client.
srv2_li6: Reference letters, payslips and other employment documents
srv2_p1: We provide NAATI-stamped translations for migration, study or work purposes in Australia. We work with legal translation experts to ensure documents are accurate and accepted by Australian authorities. Translations are delivered digitally or with a physical stamp, as required. We want to help you achieve your dreams!
srv2_p2: We translate all types of documents. Feel free to contact us if your document is not on the list.
srv3_p: We provide a human review of texts generated by translation memories or machine translation tools. Does your brand image or the dissemination of important information depend on a translation? Then it’s essential to have it reviewed by trained human professionals. We’re here to help!
srv4_p: We act as an intermediary in spoken conversations—both in person and remotely—to ensure the message is conveyed accurately and appropriately.
srv4_p1: We act as an intermediary in spoken conversations, both in person and remotely, to ensure the message is conveyed accurately and appropriately.
svc1_p: Accurate, specialised translations of technical or scientific documents.
svc2_p: Official NAATI-certified translations for migration, educational and employment purposes.
svc3_p: Professional certified interpreting services for official and daily-life settings.
svc4_p: Accurate conversion of audiovisual content into clear, structured text.
svc5_p: Professional review of texts or translations produced with automated tools.
timeline_aria: Steps to request a NAATI quote
timeline_p1: Write your message, fill in your details and choose the turnaround time. When you click on “Send enquiry,” you’ll be able to attach documents in PDF or JPG format.
timeline_p2: We'll check their page count, format and complexity to quote accurately.
timeline_p3: We'll send you the quote and turnaround time, and we'll wait for your confirmation.
